name: AIR-DROW Localization & Theme Final Edition
delivery: This complete interaction-and-hand-scan source package is ready for npm ci and npm run vercel:build. node_modules and public are intentionally excluded because the production output is regenerated from package-lock.json and web during build.
iconReplacement: The complete local icon package remains installed. Scanner status marks use resilient inline vectors for Android, while the editable local icon package remains available for future artwork replacement.
